title: Warm Malty British Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting lamb casserole infused with malty flavors, perfect for a romantic dinner, featuring soy sauce and infuse-oil, and free from onion and garlic, this dish is a classic representation of British cuisine, specifically from Yorkshire
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together malt extract, soy sauce, and infuse-oil
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the malt mixture
In a large Dutch oven, layer the lamb, carrots, and potatoes
In a separate bowl, whisk together tomato paste and beef broth
Pour the tomato paste mixture over the lamb and vegetables
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven
Bake for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve hot
